description: Update an existing Notion page — append text to body, update title, or modify database properties. Uses in-place editing on existing content.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Notion pages are edited in-place — click anywhere on the page to enter edit mode. No explicit edit button exists. To append content: click at the end of the last block, press Enter to create new block, then type. To update title: click on title (contenteditable with data in .notion-title-block), select all, type new title. Database property updates: click on property value cell in table view.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Navigate to page URL. Click at end of .notion-page-content to enter edit mode. Append via End key + Enter + type. Title update: click .notion-title-block span, Ctrl+A, type new title. Autosave triggers every 2s after changes.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Notion tracks editing sessions and may flag accounts that make very rapid edits. Use 60ms+ typing delay. Wait 2s after each editing action for autosave. Do not reload page immediately after edit — wait 3s for save confirmation.
reasoning.performance: Navigate 4s + enter edit 1s + typing variable + autosave wait 2s = ~10-15s base.

page_url.description: URL of the Notion page to update

append_text.description: Text to append to the page body as a new block

new_title.description: New title to replace existing page title (optional)

steps.description: Navigate to the target Notion page
Verify authenticated — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED if login page
Click title to enter edit mode on title
Click at the last block to position cursor for append
Move cursor to end of last block
Create new block for appended content
Type appended text in new block
Wait for Notion autosave to persist all changes
Capture updated page state as evidence

error_handling.session_expired: Detect notion.so/login redirect — run notion-oauth-login recipe first
error_handling.page_not_found: Detect 'Page not found' message — page may have been deleted or URL is wrong
error_handling.page_private: Detect 'you need access' — page is private and session user was not invited
error_handling.page_not_editable: Detect editor toolbar absence — page may be in view-only mode, check permissions
error_handling.autosave_failed: Detect offline/saving indicator stalled — wait 5s and retry, then abort with SAVE_FAILED
